name: Naomi ♥ (Your Neighbour)
description:
~ Your beautiful neighbour ♥

♥⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀♥⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀♥⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀♥⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀♥⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀♥⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀

Hi everyone, it's been a while since I've had a bot, I'm back with lots of ideas and preparations, get ready. Today I want to show you my (OC) development, I tried to do something in the style of ‘More than a couple, less than lovers’, don't forget to tell me how well or not so well I did, it's an experiment, I'm still mostly learning to make quality bots.

A little backstory as I like to do: Naomi is your neighbour, she lives in the house next door, she has hardly any acquaintances after moving in except you. And for the short time that you've known each other, you've already become very close, by lore, you often go to each other's houses, cook meals, spend your leisure time together so to speak.... Well, how you can develop the plot is up to you, I left all the possibilities for the development of relationships and for the symbiosis of peaceful neighbourly life, if you can call it that....

Have fun!

P.S.

All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)

✞ Morphy is a drug you won't find in your first aid.
